title: veronica spicata subsp. crassifolia
intro: Veronica spicata subsp. crassifolia, also known as thick-leaved speedwell, is a subspecies of perennial plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is a herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Veronica spicata subsp. crassifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, with the dried leaves and flowers used in herbal remedies.
